title: About Me
description: I am a professional with a strong orientation toward creativity, logical thinking, and problem solving. My journey began exploring engineering and music, where I developed complex skills in designing and building instruments, composing, and structuring systems. Later, I applied the same curiosity and discipline to programming, creating educational games with original music and complete management systems, including databases with over 100 optimized tables for multiple domains. This experience allows me to build scalable and efficient solutions.
